tasks.label: E2E: Run All Tests
tasks.command: cd packages/backend && (docker-compose up -d postgres 2>/dev/null || docker compose up -d postgres 2>/dev/null || true) && cd ../.. && yarn workspace @allurereport/backend run migration:run && yarn workspace @allurereport/backend run test:e2e && yarn workspace @allurereport/e2e run test:frontend-backend

tasks.label: Dev: Start DB + Backend + Frontend + Load Demo + Open Browser
